changelog.notes:
Internal versioning workflow update
- Addons-repo versioning rules now match the JMT Studio pattern (explicit PATCH/MINOR/MAJOR bumps with defined criteria)
- Manifest schema adds an optional 'minStudioVersion' field for future Studio-coordinated MAJOR bumps
- No user-visible behavior change from v1.0.18

Added 'What's New' release notes
- This section. Now you can see what changed in the JMT Add-ons each time you update.
- No functional code changes from v1.0.17.

Added Pixel Relay style
- Alternating two-color flash on 1 or 2 pixels (red 9x then green 5x, etc.)
- Designed for Luke ROTJ cave-scene arrow accents
- Configurable: flash period, single-pixel mode, start-index offset
- Available as PixelRelay (top-level) or PixelRelayL (layer form)

Added chassis detect via BladeID resistance
- Detect chassis presence using the BladeID resistance reading instead of a dedicated detect pin
- Drop-in alternative to CHASSIS_DETECT_PIN, fires the same chassisin/out sounds and triggers
- Configured via JMT_CHASSIS_DETECT_RANGE (min/max of the chassis-out detection window)
- Lets removable-chassis builds reuse the BladeID line and save a physical detect wire

Added JMT_NO_BLADE_VALUE for blade detect on ProffieOS 7.x
- Brings the OS 8+ NO_BLADE_ID_RANGE behavior to users still on ProffieOS 7.x
- Lets you use a custom sentinel ohm value to mark 'no blade' in your BladeConfig
- Fires EFFECT_BLADEIN and EFFECT_BLADEOUT correctly on state transitions
- Plays bladein.wav and bladeout.wav on insert/remove
